creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
No, it really does not fetch anymore:

rene@e17:/usr/ports/irc/psybnc % make MASTER_SITE_BACKUP= TRYBROKEN=yes checksum
===>   NOTICE:

The psybnc port currently does not have a maintainer. As a result, it is
more likely to have unresolved issues, not be up-to-date, or even be removed in
the future. To volunteer to maintain this port, please create an issue at:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla

More information about port maintainership is available at:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/contributing/ports-contributing.html#maintain-port

===>   NOTICE:

This port is deprecated; you may wish to reconsider installing it:

Broken for more than 6 months.

It is scheduled to be removed on or after 2020-05-05.

===>  License GPLv1+ accepted by the user
Trying build of psybnc-2.3.2.9_2 even though it is marked BROKEN.
===>   psybnc-2.3.2.9_2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> psyBNC-2.3.2-9.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.psybnc.at/download/beta/psyBNC-2.3.2-9.tar.gz
fetch: transfer timed out
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/irc/psybnc

That's after waiting for a minute on an otherwise fine connection.

If you know of a working MASTER_SITE or a newer version, please let us know.
